source.notes: Groups 001-004 zone semantics from the official VW Golf/Vento 2E Digifant workshop manual (ed. 04.1993): prog level >=1390 uses 4 display zones per group; this ECU reports software 1576. The 10-field group 000 matches the manual's <=1083 ten-zone basic-setting display (wire: param-less 0x12 -> 0xF4, 10 bytes, confirmed live). Wire scaling of group 001-004 zones still unvalidated (formula=raw) - capture a VCDS trace to calibrate. Groups 005-010 remain inferred from sibling label 037-906-023. Timing specs: check 4-8 deg BTDC at 2000-2500 rpm, set 6+/-1 deg (distributor); full advance 35-45 deg at 2800 rpm; idle 770-870 rpm; CO 0.2-1.2 %.

compatibility.vehicle_notes: VW T3 home conversion, engine side 2E, drivetrain side JX (flywheel/clutch/bellhousing/gearbox). Do not assume Golf 3 flywheel timing marks.

000.label: Primary display (10 raw fields, no type bytes) - gateway to Basic Settings

fields.name: Intake air temp (candidate)
fields.notes: Non-linear NTC raw 70-160 at idle = 4.5-72degC. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Battery voltage (candidate)
fields.notes: raw 115-161 = 12.0-16.5 V (V ~ raw*0.1024). Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Coolant temp (candidate)
fields.notes: degC = raw - 40 (exact on 025-ADY). Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Engine load (candidate)
fields.notes: raw 25-55 = 9.75-19.5% at idle. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Lambda sensor voltage (candidate)
fields.notes: V = raw*0.02; 0-1.10 V. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Lambda learning additive (candidate)
fields.notes: raw 0-22 = 0-0.75 ms. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Operating condition bitfield
fields.notes: Bitfield. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Throttle angle (candidate)
fields.notes: raw 5-14 = 2.5-6.5deg at idle. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Injection time (candidate)
fields.notes: ~2-4 ms at warm idle. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

fields.name: Engine speed (candidate)
fields.notes: rpm = raw*32 (exact on 025-ADY); raw 23-27 = 736-864 rpm idle. Layout candidate A from successor label 037-906-025-ADY; alternative layout B exists (ABK twin: coolant/load/rpm/idle-stab/lambda/ignition). MUST be verified on the 2E (ticket 14).

001.label: Idling check: rpm / coolant / lambda / conditions
001.source_note: VW Golf/Vento 2E workshop manual ed. 04.1993 (prog level >=1390; ours is 1576)

fields.name: Engine speed
fields.notes: Official idle spec 770-870 rpm; governed speed 6400-6500 rpm

fields.name: Coolant temperature
fields.notes: Manual: checks require >85 °C; -40 °C = open circuit in sender G62; jumps of 2-5 °C = control unit fault

fields.name: Lambda voltage
fields.notes: Manual: must fluctuate by more than 0.3 V after 1 min at 2500 rpm; 0.00 V = earth/connector, 0.45 V steady with connector separated = renew probe G39

fields.name: Test conditions bitfield
fields.notes: 00000000 = check conditions satisfied. 01000000 auto-gearbox signal not OK; 00100000 A/C not off; 00000100 throttle not closed; 00000010 engine speed outside range; 00000001 coolant below 85 °C

002.label: Supply: battery voltage / intake air temperature
002.source_note: VW Golf/Vento 2E workshop manual ed. 04.1993 (prog level >=1390; ours is 1576)

fields.name: Engine speed (likely)
fields.notes: Zone 1 not documented in manual; likely engine speed

fields.name: Raw field 002/2
fields.notes: Zone 2 not documented in manual

fields.name: Battery voltage
fields.notes: Manual: approx. battery voltage, constant; fluctuation = renew current supply relay J176

fields.name: Intake air temperature
fields.notes: Manual: must drop when sender G42 sprayed with refrigerant

003.label: Load: throttle angle / air mass meter
003.source_note: VW Golf/Vento 2E workshop manual ed. 04.1993 (prog level >=1390; ours is 1576)

fields.name: Engine speed (likely)
fields.notes: Zone 1 not documented in manual; likely engine speed

fields.name: Raw field 003/2
fields.notes: Zone 2 not documented in manual

fields.name: Throttle valve angle
fields.notes: Manual: must increase uniformly over the complete range (potentiometer G69)

fields.name: Air mass meter
fields.notes: Official spec 10-30 % at idle; outside = idling stabilization / intake leaks / renew air mass meter

004.label: Engine operating mode
004.source_note: VW Golf/Vento 2E workshop manual ed. 04.1993 (prog level >=1390; ours is 1576)

fields.name: Engine speed (likely)
fields.notes: Zone 1 not documented in manual; likely engine speed

fields.name: Raw field 004/2
fields.notes: Zone 2 not documented in manual

fields.name: Raw field 004/3
fields.notes: Zone 3 not documented in manual

fields.name: Operating mode bitfield
fields.notes: From left: pos1 overrun cut-off (10000000, throttle closed >1200 rpm), pos2 idling (01000000), pos3 part load (00100000), pos4 full load (00010000)

fields.name: Throttle valve angle
fields.notes: WOT >= 90°; 0.0° = open circuit to TPS; >=90° at idle = short to + in TPS wiring

fields.name: Lambda signal (candidate)
fields.notes: Sibling label: varies 30-50 at warm idle, no units; validate on vehicle

fields.name: Lambda signal wide (candidate)
fields.notes: Sibling label: varies widely 0-256, no units

011.label: Ignition timing (Basic Settings candidate) - validate on vehicle

fields.name: Ignition advance (ECU-reported)
fields.notes: Spec 6 (4-8) deg BTDC at ~2250 rpm in Basic Settings. ECU-reported only; timing is set mechanically by rotating the distributor. Validate on vehicle.

dtc_catalog.00281: Vehicle Speed Sensor G68 - no signal
dtc_catalog.00512: Hall sensor reference point / signal error
dtc_catalog.00515: Camshaft Position (Hall) Sensor G40 - no signal (classic 2E stall fault, check distributor)
dtc_catalog.00520: Air Flow Meter G70/G19 (2E: vane AFM)
dtc_catalog.00522: Coolant Temperature Sensor G62 - open/short (symptom: 1200-3000 rpm warm-start idle)
dtc_catalog.65535: Internal Control Module Memory Error (ECU defective)
